---
title: "Blogs"
---

::: {.page-title}
Short reflective posts about analytics practice, model selection, business strategy, and portfolio development.
:::

::: {.section}
::: {.blog-grid}
::: {.blog-card}
### Choosing Between BERT and Generative AI

A reflection on why model choice depends on workflow, constraints, cost, interpretability, and the business context.

[Read more](projects/project-bert-genai.html){.card-link}
:::

::: {.blog-card}
### Why Data Collection Shapes Analysis

Lessons from the FAI CRM project on how upstream data decisions shape downstream insight.

[Read more](projects/project-fai-crm.html){.card-link}
:::

::: {.blog-card}
### Building a Professional E-Portfolio

A reflection on using Quarto, GitHub Pages, and structured writing to communicate analytical work.

[Read reflection](reflection.html){.card-link}
:::
:::
:::
